ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the employee resides */,
  "email_domain" TEXT /* Email domain of the employee */,
  "employee_left" INTEGER /* Indicator if the employee has left the company */,
  "hired_through_smtp" INTEGER /* Indicator if the employee was hired through SMTP */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee left the company */,
  "termination_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the employee's departure */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department to which the employee belongs */,
  "work_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of work (full-time, part-time, etc.) */,
  "workload_id" INTEGER /* Workload configuration for the employee */,
  "hiring_source" TEXT /* Source through which the employee was hired */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's manager */,
  "pht_program_id" INTEGER /* ID if the employee is part of the PHT Program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_email_domain FOREIGN KEY ("email_domain") REFERENCES email_domains ("domain_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_pht_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("pht_program_id") REFERENCES pht_program ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_work_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("work_type_id") REFERENCES work_types ("work_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_workload_id FOREIGN KEY ("workload_id") REFERENCES workloads ("workload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_city FOREIGN KEY ("city") REFERENCES cities ("city_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee being reviewed */,
  "manager_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the manager regarding likelihood of employee leaving */,
  "most_recent_evaluation" INTEGER /* Score of the most recent performance evaluation */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was conducted */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Detailed comments from the manager */,
  "employee_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the employee about their own performance */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person conducting the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee associated with the activity */,
  "twitter_activity" INTEGER /* Activity score for Twitter engagement */,
  "facebook_activity" INTEGER /* Activity score for Facebook engagement */,
  "instagram_activity" INTEGER /* Activity score for Instagram engagement */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the social media activity */,
  "linkedin_activity" INTEGER /* Activity score for LinkedIn engagement */,
  "total_activity_score" INTEGER /* Aggregate score of all social media activities */,
  "activity_comments" TEXT /* Comments or insights from the social media activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_activity_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey response */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee filling out the survey */,
  "attitude_work_type" INTEGER /* Employee's attitude towards work type */,
  "attitude_workload" INTEGER /* Employee's attitude towards workload */,
  "peer_attitude_manager" INTEGER /* Average peer attitude towards the manager */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was completed */,
  "survey_comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the employee in the survey */,
  "survey_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_surveys_survey_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_type_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_surveys_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pht_program" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee marked for the program */,
  "marked_for_program" INTEGER /* Indicator if the employee is marked for the PHT Program */,
  "program_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee was marked for the PHT Program */,
  "program_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee was removed from the PHT Program */,
  "program_reason" TEXT /* Reason for marking the employee for the PHT Program */,
  "program_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the PHT Program (e.g., improved, no change, left the company) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pht_program_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "email_domains" (
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each email domain */,
  "domain_name" TEXT /* Name of the email domain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Manager ID for the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department managed by the manager */,
  "manager_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the manager started managing the department */,
  "manager_termination_date" TEXT /* Date when the manager left the company */,
  "manager_termination_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the manager's departure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_managers_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_types" (
  "work_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work type */,
  "work_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the work type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("work_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workloads" (
  "workload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workload type */,
  "workload_description" TEXT /* Description of the workload */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workload_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the survey evaluates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee data was accessed */,
  "type_of_access" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the administrator who accessed the data */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)
